objective: Promote delivery-truth/v1 into a production verifier module and additive pr-closeout consumer seam.
deepModuleBoundary: src/lib/delivery-truth/** production verifier core plus a narrow src/lib/pr-closeout/** adapter/helper seam; no new command family and no harness next implementation in this slice.
reviewCoverageGap: planning-specialist-agent returned PASS mailbox findings on the final recheck but did not persist artifacts/reviews/pu010-intent-final-planning.md after one focused retry; coordinator proceeds with explicit planning artifact gap and two final pass artifacts.

planAlignmentRef.decision: PU-010 excludes src/commands/next*.ts implementation and validation; PU-013 owns cockpit command projection after production verdicts exist.

automationPlan.proof: production verdict fields and claim status coverage
stale, unknown, missing, and non-claim-support receipts block pass verdicts
additive closeout consumption or downgrade behavior
separate external_state, review_state, and pr_closeout evidence families
producer TTL overreach and verifier timestamp fixtures
missing artifact receipt and invalid evidence-ref fixtures
verdicts do not replace unrelated closeout claims
acceptance map and slice receipt before PR handoff

requiredFreshnessGate: git rev-parse codex/jsc-363-runtime-evidence-pu009 && git ls-remote origin refs/heads/codex/jsc-363-runtime-evidence-pu009
